---
name: Bug report
about: Report a factual error, broken link, inconsistent claim, or repository packaging problem.
title: "[bug] "
labels: bug
---

## Summary

Describe the issue in one paragraph.

## Affected Surface

- README
- reference architecture
- sequencing analysis
- research report
- OpenRNA bridge
- publication/governance surface
- other

## Expected

What should the repository say or do instead?

## Actual

What is wrong right now?

## Evidence

List the exact file path, section title, line excerpt, link target, or external source that supports your report.

## Publication Safety Check

- [ ] I did not include personal genomic data.
- [ ] I did not include secrets or credentials.
- [ ] This issue is not asking for medical advice.
- [ ] If this is security-sensitive, I will use `SECURITY.md` instead of a public issue.
